completed_tasks.name: Task 0.1: Initialize electron-vite project with React + TypeScript
Task 0.2: Install all dependencies and fix preload script absolute path

remaining_tasks.name: Task 0.3: Setup Tailwind CSS v4 with @theme directive
Task 1.1: Implement CSS variable theme system
Task 4.1: Wire all components, IPC handlers, and stores

decisions.decision: Downgrade vite from 8.x to 7.x because electron-vite@5.0.0 requires vite@^5.0.0 || ^6.0.0 || ^7.0.0
Downgrade electron from 42 to 41 because better-sqlite3 12.10.0 is incompatible with Electron 42's V8 API
decisions.rationale: V8 API changes in Node.js 24/Electron 42 broke native module compilation

decisions.decision: Downgrade electron-store from v11 to v8.2.0 because v11 is ESM-only
decisions.rationale: electron-store v11 uses ESM exports only, incompatible with Electron main process CJS context

decisions.decision: vite version changed from ^8.0.13 to ^7.0.0 in package.json
Make preload path absolute using path.join
decisions.rationale: Electron BrowserWindow requires absolute paths for preload script

next_action: Task 0.3: Setup Tailwind CSS v4 with @theme directive
context_notes: All previous blocker items resolved. Tested Electron app runtime using npm run dev and the main window opens successfully without errors.
